sectionTitle.default: Everything you need to know about Jetpack

sectionDescription.default: From security to performance, here is how Jetpack protects and accelerates your WordPress site.

default.question: What is Jetpack?
default.answer: Jetpack is a suite of security, performance, and growth tools built by Automattic for WordPress sites. You can install individual plugins like Jetpack Boost, Jetpack Social, or VaultPress Backup, or get everything in one place with the main Jetpack plugin.

default.question: Does Jetpack work with any WordPress host?
default.answer: Yes. Jetpack works with any self-hosted WordPress site regardless of your hosting provider. It's trusted by more than 27 million WordPress sites worldwide, from personal blogs to large-scale businesses.

default.question: Will Jetpack slow down my site?
default.answer: Not at all. Jetpack's modular architecture means you only activate the features you need. Security scanning and backups run on Automattic's cloud servers, not yours. Jetpack Boost actively improves your site speed with critical CSS, image CDN, and lazy loading.

default.question: How do backups and restores work?
default.answer: VaultPress Backup saves every change to your site in real time to Automattic's secure cloud infrastructure. If anything goes wrong, you can restore your entire site to any point in time with a single click from the activity log.

default.question: Is there a free version of Jetpack?
default.answer: Yes. Jetpack offers a generous free tier that includes brute force attack protection, downtime monitoring, site stats, and a CDN for images. Paid plans unlock real-time backups, automated malware scanning, spam filtering, and advanced growth tools.

default.question: What security features does Jetpack provide?
default.answer: Jetpack Security includes real-time backups, a web application firewall (WAF), automated malware scanning with one-click fixes, brute force attack protection, downtime monitoring, spam filtering powered by Akismet, and a detailed activity log of every change on your site.
